title: micromeria cristata
intro: Micromeria cristata, also known as mountain mint or creeping mint, is a low-growing, herbaceous perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits are said to include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Micromeria cristata is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
